question: All of the following are disadvantages of composite restoration except:

history.message:
Agent1 Round 1: Composite restorations, while beneficial for their esthetic properties, have several drawbacks including potential localized wear due to material hardness differences compared to natural tooth structure. They also require careful technique to achieve optimal results but do not inherently take more time than other materials when considering overall chairside procedure duration post-preparation. The exception here is that they generally don't necessitate longer reapplication times after failure like some alternative materials might.
